description: Appliance setup-mode smoke: authenticated `/` detects `mode: setup` and navigates to `/setup/` while avoiding redirects outside setup mode.
Appliance setup UI smoke: `/setup/` shows install-code-first guidance, hides main fields before code entry, reveals fields after code entry, and keeps release controls under Advanced.
Appliance status UI smoke: `/` renders a prominent setup CTA when setup is reeditable or setup is not complete.
nm-store server-action unit test: Essentials registration calls the server-side register+email helper but returns no installCode/downloadUrl to the client.

nm-store provisioning unit test: paid checkout provisioning and already-provisioned refresh paths do not expose installCode/downloadUrl to the thank-you page contract while preserving email/idempotency behavior.
Manual/browser review: Essentials and paid appliance order pages show only email confirmation/instructions, never raw install code or ISO URL.
